raw_text: alfredo perez martinez cell phone: +0034 616796002 email: apmtel( hotmail.com languages: spanish (native speaker) english (advanced cambridge c1) french (delf b1) german (zertifikat deutsch b1) identity card number: 71650462b place and date of birth: oviedo (spain), the 2* april 1981 address: oviedo / madrid, spain home phone: 985115704 driving license: b and btp, owning a car. member of the spanish official telecom engineers association, number 16154 training abroad one academic year at the technical university of denmark academic training 2007 telecom engineer, by the university of oviedo. specialization by the technical university of denmark (dtu). 2007-2008 master in business administration (mba). specialization in marketing. 2010-2012 master in process control, electric engineering and industrial electronics, by the university of oviedo (in process). high school. average grade: 9.85/10 further training 2007 management technician (quality, environment, safety, audit) by the center for quality in asturias. norms iso 9001, 14001, 18001, une 66175, 19011. 50 hours. 2005 access and home networks. technical university of denmark. 35 hours. 2002 statistical information on the internet. university of oviedo. 45 hours. professional experience 2012 csic (spanish national research council) contract telecom engineer for researching. 2012 university of oviedo grant researcher in electronics. full time. department of electric, electronic, computer and system engineering. alfredo pérez martínez 2011-2012 ingenieria integral / endesa telecom engineer. full time. services of engineering for dam emergency plans for hydroelectric power stations for endesa: - writing of construction project reports - technical leader. - equipment supply control. - contact with the acoustics propagation simulation software cadnaa. - design of a low power solar installation. 2010-2011 emulsa (public municipal enterprise of urban environmental services of gijon, s. a.), municipality of gijon). r&d+i (research and devolpment + innovation) technician. full time. contract obtained in a public competitive examination. functions: - technological watch. - collecting improvement ideas, analysis and selection. - programming the annual innovation plan. - project management: o creation of work plans for the approved projects. o individual management of the approved projects. o participation in the other activities: identification and preliminary definition of possible innovation projects. o evaluation of those for proposing priorities, monitoring and control of the project portfolio and evaluation of results. - results management: suitable application of protection rights to the results (when applicable, subcontracting control). - resources management: o participation in the search and supply of the necessary resources for the projects. o application of fiscal incentives to the r&d+i (when applicable, subcontracting control). o setting-up and maintenance of the management system of r&d+1. 2010 athenas communication and logistics. technical assistant. full time. engineering projects for abertis telecom, mainly. design of installations for broadcasting centers of dtt and radio, from the communication equipment to the radiating systems. coverage studies of centers with a radioelectric simulation program (software sirenet), and studies of radioelectric emission of antennas (software a3d). field work at broadcasting facilities. setting-up of new installations and equipment reconfigurations. use of network analyzers for measuring adaptations, and spectrum analysers. measurement of signals. 2009-2010 satec / overon (abertis group) at interxion / fox international network operations center technician. full time. operation, maintenance and installation of communication equipment at a data center of interxion, for overon (satellite services provider). use of video and data transmission equipment, encoders, decoders, multiplexers, switches, optical fiber networks, amplifiers and other rf equipment. 2008 2008 2006 alfredo pérez martínez abertis telecom (former rete vision) internship. technical support to the management of the telecommunications network of abertis: - supervision of reforms and equipment installations at abertis telecom facilities. - use of the corporate software great (technical database) and pandora (facilities graphic plans database), gis (geographic information system) software, excel charts, and autocad for designing plans of facilities - writing of installation and equipment relocation reports. - participation in tasks of remote monitoring of networks and equipment. climastar global company practices at the quality control department. quality control department: - planning of quality integration systems through study of the companys registers. - quality checks in situ. - writing of non compliance reports. - classification and analysis of norms (iso, din, nf, ul, nom, etc.), regulations (electric regulation for low voltage) and directives (european directive for low power) in the files of the company. practices at the production department: - plant supervision and files management. university of oviedo contract researcher. half time. at the organisation engineering group of the university of oviedo, about logistics, value chain, workers shift optimization, and industrial plant optimization. assignation to a european scope r&d+i project. languages english: certificates: - certificate in advanced english of the university of cambridge. level c1. 2006. - technical english (annual course of industrial engineering). grade: honours. 2000. stays: - 1 month english course in maryland, u.s.a. 1998. french certificates: -
